summary:
The provided information confirms that collagen is the most abundant protein in the human body based on authoritative biochemical references emphasizing its critical roles in supporting connective tissue structures such as skin, tendons, bones, and ligaments. Its prevalence throughout these essential bodily components underscores why it holds this status among all known human proteins.
